parts.text:
```plantuml
@startuml
title Update Relationship Event Handler UML

box "SNS" #D87093
participant "Event Dispatcher Topic" as SNS
end box

box "Lambda" #FF8C00
participant "Update Relationship Event Handler" as Lambda
end box

box "DynamoDB" #4169E1
participant "Relationship Owner Table" as OwnerTable
participant "Relationship Commitment Table" as CommitmentTable
end box

activate SNS
SNS -> Lambda : filter on\nRelationship::Update Event
activate Lambda

Lambda -> Lambda : [SessionDecorator.puml]
activate Lambda
deactivate Lambda

Lambda -> Lambda : [TrackEventHandlerWrapper.puml]
activate Lambda
deactivate Lambda

Lambda -> Lambda : extract Message from Event
activate Lambda
deactivate Lambda

Lambda -> Lambda : validate Message
activate Lambda
deactivate Lambda

Lambda -> Lambda : validate event-name
activate Lambda
deactivate Lambda

Lambda -> Lambda : validate event-version
activate Lambda
deactivate Lambda

Lambda -> Lambda : validate stage
activate Lambda
deactivate Lambda

Lambda -> OwnerTable : Get Existing Relationship
activate OwnerTable
OwnerTable --> Lambda
deactivate OwnerTable

Lambda -> Lambda : Generate Relationship Dict
activate Lambda
deactivate Lambda

Lambda -> Lambda : Combine Existing Relationship\nAttributes With New Changes
activate Lambda
deactivate Lambda

opt if missing required schema key
    Lambda -> Lambda : <color:red>Error Handling</color>
    activate Lambda
    deactivate Lambda
end

Lambda -> Lambda : Get AdditionalAttributes
activate Lambda
deactivate Lambda

alt if Relationship contains description and AdditionalAttributes\ndoesn't contain completed signal
    Lambda -> OwnerTable : update Relationship
    activate OwnerTable
    OwnerTable --> Lambda
    deactivate OwnerTable
else
    Lambda -> Lambda : <color:red>Error Handling</color>
    activate Lambda
    deactivate Lambda
end

Lambda -> Lambda : Generate commitments to add or delete
activate Lambda
deactivate Lambda

alt if Commitment Operations Exist
    Lambda -> Lambda : Generate starting indexes based on AdditionalAttributes
    activate Lambda
    deactivate Lambda

    Lambda -> CommitmentTable : Batch_Write() RelationshipCommitments
    activate CommitmentTable
    CommitmentTable --> Lambda
    deactivate CommitmentTable
else
    Lambda -> Lambda : <color:red>Error Handling</color>
    activate Lambda
    deactivate Lambda
end

Lambda -> Lambda : Track Event Handler Wrapper
activate Lambda
deactivate Lambda

Lambda -> Lambda : Error Handler Wrapper
activate Lambda
deactivate Lambda

deactivate Lambda
deactivate SNS

@enduml
```
